### Typography Assessment Test

Advanced

45 mins

This Typography test evaluates candidates' expertise in digital design, branding, and print design, focusing on principles, typeface selection, and basics.

Typography Basics

Typography Principles

### Oracle ADF Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This Oracle ADF test evaluates candidates' proficiency in key areas such as Data Binding and Expression Language, ADF Business Components, ADF Faces and UI Components, ADF Task Flows, ADF Security, and Oracle ADF Overview. It is designed for Oracle ADF Developers to assess their foundational skills.

Oracle ADF Overview

ADF Business Components

ADF Faces and UI Components

Data Binding and Expression Language

### SAP HANA Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This SAP HANA test evaluates candidates' proficiency in SAP HANA Administration, Basics, Integration, Modeling, Security, and SQL Scripting. It is designed to assess the ability to manage and optimize SAP HANA environments effectively.

SAP HANA Basics

SAP HANA Security

SAP HANA Integration

SAP HANA Administration

### Grails Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This Grails test evaluates candidates' proficiency in Controllers, Grails Basics, Views, GORM, Tag Libraries and Helpers, Groovy and Grails Integration, and Technical Communication. It is designed to assess the ability to develop and maintain applications using the Grails framework.

Grails Basics

Groovy and Grails Integration

GORM (Grails Object Relational Mapping)

Controllers

### Hibernate Assessment Test

Advanced

45 mins

This Hibernate test evaluates candidates' proficiency in Transaction Management, Database Design and Management, SQL Querying, Hibernate ORM, Java Programming, and Spring Framework. It is designed to assess the ability to effectively manage and manipulate databases using Hibernate in Java applications.

Hibernate ORM

Java Programming

Database Design and Management

SQL Querying

### Mathematics for Machine Learning Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This Mathematics for Machine Learning test evaluates candidates' proficiency in key mathematical concepts essential for machine learning, including optimization theory, vector calculus, numerical methods, calculus, dynamic programming, linear algebra, and probability and statistics.

Linear Algebra

Calculus

Probability and Statistics

Optimization Theory

### Cyber Security Risk Management Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This Cyber Security Risk Management test evaluates candidates' understanding of key areas such as Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery, Security Awareness and Training, Security Policies and Procedures, Communication and Collaboration, Risk Assessment, Compliance and Regulatory Requirements, Governance and Oversight, Java, Programming (Debugging), and Cyber Threat Intelligence.

Risk Assessment

Security Policies and Procedures

Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery

Compliance and Regulatory Requirements

### Groovy Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This Groovy test evaluates candidates' proficiency in Groovy programming, focusing on functions and closures, string manipulation, and control structures. It assesses understanding of collections, data structures, and scripting for automation, ensuring candidates can effectively utilize Groovy in real-world scenarios.

Groovy Basics

Control Structures

### J2EE Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This J2EE test evaluates candidates' proficiency in three-tier architecture, EJB, Java, Servlets, JPA, JTA, JSP, and technical communication within J2EE. It is designed to assess the ability to develop robust web applications using Java technologies, ensuring candidates can effectively implement and manage enterprise-level solutions.

Three-tier architecture (client, business, data)

Java Servlets

JavaServer Pages (JSP)

Enterprise JavaBeans (EJB)

### SSAS Assessment Test

Advanced

60 mins

This SSAS test evaluates candidates' proficiency in programming logic, system deployment and management, data modeling, cube development, integration with BI tools, and MDX and DAX queries. It is designed to assess the ability to effectively manage and deploy SSAS solutions.

Data Modeling

MDX and DAX Queries

Cube Development

System Deployment and Management

Advanced

60 mins

This VMware Site Recovery Manager test evaluates candidates' expertise in disaster recovery concepts, recovery plans, installation, integration with VMware infrastructure, and SRM architecture. It assesses skills in technical documentation, automation, site pairing, monitoring, and VMware vSphere replication.

VMware SRM Overview

60 mins

This Salesforce Admin test evaluates candidates on key skills such as email integration, data management, and workflow automation. The test is designed for roles like Salesforce Administrator and Consultant.

Salesforce interface navigation

User management

60 mins

This GCP DevOps Engineer test evaluates your expertise in CI/CD pipeline setup, networking, security configurations, microservices, deployments, GitOps, GCP security, cost optimization, IAM, Docker, Infrastructure as Code, automation, monitoring, disaster recovery, testing, and serverless services.

This Lisp test evaluates candidates' understanding of functional programming concepts, error handling, debugging, and proficiency with the Common Lisp standard library.
